title: A New Version.
content:
Old Mother Hubbard
        She went to the cupboard,
     To find a nice bone for her dog.
        But when she got there
     The cupboard was bare,
        And now they are both on the hog.
meaning:
Edwin C. Ranck's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A New Version."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
